title: The Fight Against Katakuri Begins
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Katakuri, Unknown person #12 as Pedro’s sacrifice opens the escape route while Luffy enters the mirror world to hold Katakuri back.
scene: Luffy separates himself from the crew to face Katakuri in the mirror world while Sanji moves toward the cake plan.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Eating" eat in' donuts while Lyin' down! Forden! Sinful! Donuts Donuts!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: These moments are true bliss. Yummy Donuts!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Never once has he ever laid down!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: He looks down on the ground itself!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: So you saw it, did you...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We wouldn't tell a soul! Even if our mouths were torn open?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Whose mouth did you just call torn?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So you're still alive, huh? My apologies. It seems I didn't see your end through as thoroughly as I should have.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I simply couldn't wait any longer.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: There are things that surpass argument.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I cannot let those who have seen my true form live!

summary: This section advances the Luffy vs Katakuri storyline with 30 dialogue beats. Luffy commits to stopping Katakuri while the others continue the escape and Sanji turns toward the cake that may save them.
